name: Nera Systems
description: Nera Systems specializes in privacy-preserving technologies for AI and Machine Learning. The company develops innovative tools using Privacy Enhancing Technologies (PETs) and SW/HW co-design to protect sensitive data throughout the AI/ML lifecycle. By offering scalable, privacy-first solutions, Nera Systems enables organizations to leverage the power of AI while ensuring the highest standards of data privacy and security, empowering safe and responsible innovation.

extra.brief_description: Nera Systems specializes in privacy-preserving technologies for AI and Machine Learning. The company develops innovative tools using Privacy Enhancing Technologies (PETs) and SW/HW co-design to protect sensitive data throughout the AI/ML lifecycle. By offering scalable, privacy-first solutions, Nera Systems enables organizations to leverage the power of AI while ensuring the highest standards of data privacy and security, empowering safe and responsible innovation.

name: N3MUS
description:
N3MUS serves as the essential bridge, connecting traditional gamers to blockchain technology while providing a cost-effective and user-friendly gaming experience.

N3MUS approach involves standardising services and infrastructure for the gaming industry, thereby reducing development costs and time to market, ensuring technology stability, and avoiding long-term technical debt.

N3MUS serves as the essential bridge, connecting traditional gamers to blockchain technology while providing a cost-effective and user-friendly gaming experience.

N3MUS approach involves standardising services and infrastructure for the gaming industry, thereby reducing development costs and time to market, ensuring technology stability, and avoiding long-term technical debt.
